title: urera javaensis
intro: Urera javaensis, also known as Java nettle or Java polypody, is a species of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia, particularly in Indonesia and Malaysia. Urera javaensis has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which help to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as protect against cell damage. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is believed to offer various health benefits, such as improving respiratory health, reducing fever, and supporting digestion.
